title: Christmas Drawstring Bags - 18 pcs Reusable Xmas Present Fast Wrapping Foil With Tags, Assorted Size Shining Gift for Birthday Goody Holiday Treat or Party Favor
features: Fast Wrapping Solution: Drawstring gift bags are use friendly to everyone especially for the arthritic hands, just putting the gift in the bag and pulling the plug-in ribbons, took seconds and done. Much easier than stressful wrapping paper and save lots of time to sit back and enjoy your Christmas.

Strong & Reusable: These drawstring gift bags are built with durable aluminum foil materials and double locking edge, makes it be stronger and not easy to tear up. Additional，the premium quality allowed it can be reused for many times.

For Kinds of Gifts: Suits for kinds of gift such as toys, candies, biscuits, chocolate, clothes, odd shaped presents or anything else you prepared. Luxury and shiny foil present bags helps adds a layer of beauty and anticipation to your carefully chosen gifts.
Wide Application: An ideal choice gift wrapping bags not just for Christmas, but also for birthday, party, wedding, holiday and any other occasions. You can keep it at home in case of an emergency.

Packing List: Total 18 pcs of foil gift bags in 6 different sizes for all your needs, and also come with 18 name tags to identify different owner gifts. Each gift bags will sparkling under lights like a mirror disco ball, outstanding your gifts and also decoration the festival.
description: Product Description SMALUCK Fast Wrapping Solution - 18Pcs Drawstring Gift Bags & 18 Tags 🟢 This kinds of Christmas drawstring gift bags are the most simple, stylish, stress free way to achieve stylish gift wrappin g every time, in no time at all. No tape, no scissors, no tissue and no waste of time - just few seconds and done. 🟢 Each SMALUCK Xmas foil present bags comes complete with its own plug-in drawstring design and tags making it very practical, and it can be reused for several times. It will be an idea choice for busy people, young children or people with arthritic hands that difficult to wrap a present with traditional wrapping paper . Product Features Convenient Drawstring No tape, no scissors, no tissue and no waste of time - just few seconds and done. Bright Colours 6 bright colours available : rose red, siliver, blue, red, green, gold. Shinning Look These foil gift bags will sparkling like a party mirror ball under lights, makes your gifts outstanding. Strong Locked Edge Durable aluminum foil materials and double locking edge, makes it be stronger and not easy to tear up. Suits Kinds of Gifts Suits for kinds of gift such as toys, candies, biscuits, chocolate, clothes, odd shaped presents or anything else you prepared.
